name: unified-tvdevelopment-cli
description: Universal TUI manager for Smart TV development — LG webOS, Samsung Tizen, Amazon Fire TV, Android TV

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --alias:react-devtools-core=./scripts/devtools-stub.js --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/_bundle.mjs --loader:.js=jsx && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/_bundle.mjs > dist/cli.mjs && chmod +x dist/cli.mjs && rm dist/_bundle.mjs
